exercise_requirement: Identify real failures, test augmentations individually, document label validity, then evaluate a justified combined pipeline.
research_question: Which label-preserving transformations improve robustness to observed capture variation without damaging fine detail?
hypothesis: Moderate crop, exposure, compression, and background variation will help targeted failures, while aggressive transforms may harm detail-sensitive categories.
random_seed_policy: primary seed 42; retained comparisons repeat seeds 42, 43, and 44
safety_notes: Do not load, inspect, score, or tune against the locked test split.
